# The Founder Drop

## About
The Founder Drop is a resource for solo founders building businesses with AI. We publish guides, tool comparisons, and automation playbooks for solopreneurs, coaches, consultants, and one-person businesses. Our content covers AI tools for 130+ industries, CRM and automation setup guides, cold email systems, sales funnel frameworks, and client acquisition strategies.

## What We Cover
- AI tools and automation for every industry vertical (130+ niche guides)
- GoHighLevel CRM setup, comparisons, and automation tutorials
- Cold email systems using Instantly and Apollo
- Sales funnel frameworks and pre-sell systems
- Client acquisition strategies for solopreneurs and coaches
- AI writing tools (Jasper, Magai, Copy.ai) comparisons and reviews
- SEO tools (Ranked, Semrush, Ahrefs) comparisons
- Video and content tools (Opus Pro, Synthesia, Pictory, ElevenLabs)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is The Founder Drop?
A: A resource for solo founders building businesses with AI. We publish guides and tool comparisons for 130+ industries, all written for founders who operate alone.

Q: What CRM do you recommend for solo founders?
A: GoHighLevel. It replaces 5-7 separate tools with one platform starting at $97/month. We publish setup guides and comparison articles for GHL.

Q: What is the best cold email tool for solo founders?
A: Instantly for sending ($30-97/month) paired with Apollo for prospecting ($49-119/month). Together they generate 30-50 qualified leads per month for under $200/month.

Q: What AI tools should I use for my specific industry?
A: We publish dedicated guides for 130+ industries at thefounderdrop.com/guides/. Each covers CRM, automation, content creation, and outreach tools specific to that niche.

Q: Is The Founder Drop free?
A: Yes. All guides, comparisons, and free tools are available at no cost.
